caption: The video begins with a view of a wooden door, which is slightly ajar, revealing a glimpse of a baby crib with pink bedding inside a room. The camera then pans to the left, showing a hallway with cream-colored walls and tiled flooring. A decorative black metal railing is visible on the left side of the hallway, leading towards another room. The hallway appears well-lit, with natural light coming through a window or opening not directly visible in the frame. The overall setting suggests a clean and modern interior, possibly within a residential home. The camera movement is smooth, providing a clear and steady view of the surroundings.
